app_name.description: The extension name shown in the browser and web store.

app_description.message: Busca y compara listados de productos químicos de laboratorio en los sitios web de proveedores compatibles desde un panel lateral.
app_description.description: The extension description shown in the browser and web store.

app_title.message: ChemPal: motor de búsqueda de reactivos químicos

app_error_generic.description: Fallback message shown when the app crashes.

common_open_in_tab.description: Accessible label for the button that opens the extension in a full browser tab.

common_show_more.description: Inline link label to expand a truncated product description.

common_show_less.description: Inline link label to collapse an expanded product description.

common_back_to_search.message: Volver a la pantalla de búsqueda
common_back_to_search.description: Accessible label for the back button that returns to the search home.

about_title.description: The title of the About ChemPal section.

about_description.message: Proyecto de código abierto orientado a ayudar a los aficionados a la química a encontrar las mejores ofertas de reactivos químicos. Existen muchos servicios similares para empresas, universidades e instituciones de investigación, pero ninguno está disponible para particulares y aficionados. ChemPal solo busca en proveedores que venden a particulares y realizan envíos a domicilio.

about_contributors.description: The title of the contributors section.

about_logo_alt.description: Alt text for the ChemPal logo in the About modal.

loading_cancel.description: The text of the button to cancel the search.

loading_aborting.description: Status shown when aborting a search.

search_status_aborted.description: Status/table text when the user aborts a search.

search_error_failed.description: Fallback error text when a search fails without a specific message.

search_no_shipping_suppliers.message: Ningún proveedor envía a tu ubicación. Desactiva «Solo proveedores que envían a mi ubicación» en el panel de búsqueda para incluirlos.
search_no_shipping_suppliers.description: Shown when the ship-to filter excludes every supplier.

search_try_broaden.message: Intenta ampliar los filtros de búsqueda en el panel.
search_try_broaden.description: No-results hint when filters are active.

search_suggest_cas.message: Prueba a buscar por número CAS: $cas$

loading_loading.description: Status shown when loading a search.

loading_aria.description: Accessible label for the loading backdrop.

search_open_settings.description: Accessible label for the settings button on the search home.

search_go_to_results.description: Accessible label for the button that jumps to cached search results.

search_logo_alt.description: Alt text for the search home logo.

search_placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the main search input.

search_form_aria.description: Accessible label for the main search input.

search_submit.description: Accessible label for the search submit button.

search_advanced_options.description: Accessible label for the advanced-options (drawer) button.

search_invalid_query.description: Fallback error hint shown when a search query is invalid.

drawer_tab_search.description: Label for the Search tab in the side drawer.

drawer_tab_history.description: Label for the History tab in the side drawer.

drawer_tab_settings.description: Label for the Settings tab in the side drawer.

drawer_product_name_label.message: Nombre del producto o palabra clave
drawer_product_name_label.description: Label for the product-name field in the search drawer.

drawer_search_button.description: Label for the search button in the search drawer.

drawer_results_limit.description: Accordion title for the per-supplier results limit.

drawer_results_limit_label.description: Field label for the per-supplier results limit.

drawer_range_min.description: Label for the minimum value of a numeric range input.

drawer_range_max.description: Label for the maximum value of a numeric range input.

drawer_only_shipping_suppliers.message: Solo proveedores que envían a mi ubicación
drawer_only_shipping_suppliers.description: Checkbox label to hide suppliers that do not ship to the user's location.

drawer_hide_restricted_products.message: Ocultar productos que no puedo comprar
drawer_hide_restricted_products.description: Checkbox label to hide products restricted by region or to business/government buyers.

drawer_supplier_label.description: Drawer accordion label for the supplier selector.

drawer_supplier_empty_helper.message: Todos los proveedores se incluyen de forma predeterminada
drawer_supplier_empty_helper.description: Helper text shown when no supplier is selected.

drawer_supplier_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the supplier selector input.

drawer_country_label.description: Drawer accordion label for the country selector.

drawer_country_empty_helper.message: Todos los países se incluyen de forma predeterminada
drawer_country_empty_helper.description: Helper text shown when no country is selected.

drawer_country_placeholder.message: Escribe el país o el código
drawer_country_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the country selector input.

drawer_shipping_label.description: Drawer accordion label for the shipping-type filter.

drawer_availability_label.description: Drawer accordion label for the availability filter.

drawer_price_label.description: Drawer accordion label for the price-range filter.

filter_placeholder_title.description: Placeholder for the Title column filter.

filter_placeholder_supplier.description: Placeholder for the Supplier column filter.

filter_placeholder_country.description: Placeholder for the Country column filter.

filter_placeholder_shipping.description: Placeholder for the Shipping column filter.

filter_placeholder_availability.description: Placeholder for the Availability column filter.

filter_placeholder_description.description: Placeholder for the Description column filter.

filter_placeholder_price.description: Placeholder for the Price column filter.

filter_placeholder_quantity.description: Placeholder for the Quantity column filter.

filter_placeholder_unit.description: Placeholder for the Unit column filter.

filter_placeholder_cas.description: Placeholder for the CAS column filter.

filter_placeholder_formula.description: Placeholder for the Formula column filter.

filter_placeholder_moleweight.description: Placeholder for the Molecular Weight column filter.

filter_placeholder_purity.description: Placeholder for the Purity column filter.

filter_placeholder_concentration.description: Placeholder for the Concentration column filter.

column_price.description: Table column header / column-visibility menu label.

results_filter_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the global results filter input.

results_filter_aria.description: Accessible label for the global results filter input.

results_clear_filters.description: Tooltip/label for the button that clears all column filters.

results_toggle_filters.description: Accessible label for the header button that shows/hides the per-column filter row.

results_column_visibility.description: Accessible label for the header button that opens the column-visibility menu.

results_open_options.description: Accessible label for the header button that opens the search/settings options drawer.

results_rows_per_page_aria.description: Accessible label for the page-size selector.

results_status_searching.description: Status shown while a search is running.

results_status_no_search_query.description: Status shown when there is no search query.

results_status_no_results_filtered.message: No hay resultados que coincidan con los filtros
results_status_no_results_filtered.description: Status shown when filters exclude all results.

results_status_no_results_found.description: Status shown when a search returns nothing.

results_all.description: Page-size option that shows all rows.

history_empty.message: Aún no hay historial de búsqueda.
history_empty.description: Empty-state text for the history panel.

settings_loading.description: Fallback shown while the settings panel loads.

settings_supplier_status_desc.message: Deshabilitar un proveedor aquí lo excluye de todas las búsquedas y de los filtros de selección de proveedores.
settings_supplier_status_desc.description: Description at the top of the Supplier Status settings list.

settings_cache_results.message: Guardar resultados de búsqueda en caché

settings_do_not_cache_empty.message: No guardar en caché los resultados vacíos

settings_cache_stats.description: Small stats line under the cache section showing record count and storage size.

settings_track_price_history_desc.message: Registra el precio en USD de cada producto a lo largo del tiempo para ver si sube o baja.

settings_max_price_points.message: Máx. puntos de precio por producto (0 = ilimitado)

settings_price_history_stats.description: Small stats line under the price history section showing tracked products, total data points, and storage size.

settings_open_in_tab_desc.message: Al hacer clic en el icono de la barra de herramientas, Chem Pal se abre en una pestaña completa del navegador en lugar del popup.

settings_auto_hide_empty_columns_desc.message: Ocultar automáticamente las columnas de resultados que no tienen datos para la búsqueda actual.

settings_fuzz_scorer_helper.message: Sustituye el algoritmo predeterminado de cada proveedor

settings_max_search_time_helper.message: Sustituye el presupuesto de tiempo de búsqueda de cada proveedor. Vacío = predeterminado por proveedor; 0 = sin límite

settings_disable_fuzzy_desc.message: Muestra resultados sin procesar (búsqueda simple) o solo coincidencias booleanas (búsqueda avanzada) sin puntuación difusa

speed_dial_aria.description: Accessible label for the speed dial.

speed_dial_hint.message: Lleva el cursor a la esquina inferior derecha de la pantalla para abrir el menú
speed_dial_hint.description: Help tooltip explaining how to open the speed dial.

context_menu_copy_title.description: Context menu option to copy the title.

context_menu_copy_url.description: Context menu option to copy the URL.

context_menu_copy_product_info.description: Context menu option to copy the product info.

context_menu_ignore_product.description: Context menu option to ignore the product.

context_menu_remove_product_from_cache.description: Context menu option to remove the product from the cache.

context_menu_open_in_new_tab.description: Context menu option to open the product in a new tab.

context_menu_expand_all.description: Context menu option to expand every visible row in the results table.

context_menu_collapse_all.description: Context menu option to collapse every visible row in the results table.

context_menu_create_bookmark.description: Context menu option to create a bookmark.

context_menu_search_similar.description: Context menu option to search for similar products.

context_menu_share.description: Context menu option to share the product.

context_menu_view_details.description: Context menu option to view the details of the product.

context_menu_cache_remove_unavailable.message: Este producto no se puede quitar de la caché
context_menu_cache_remove_unavailable.description: Shown when a product can't be removed from the cache.

context_menu_search_selection.description: Right-click context menu label; %s is the selected text (substituted by Chrome).

share_fallback_title.description: Fallback title used when sharing a product with no title.

bookmark_favorites_folder.description: Name of the ChemPal favorites bookmark folder.

product_detail_sds.description: Label/title for the SDS document link.

product_detail_tds.description: Label/title for the TDS document link.

product_detail_coa.description: Label/title for the COA document link.

product_detail_prev_image.description: Accessible label for the previous-image button.

product_detail_next_image.description: Accessible label for the next-image button.

product_detail_sparkline_aria.description: Accessible label for the price-history sparkline.

product_detail_no_history.description: Shown when a product has no recorded price history.

product_detail_price_history_col_date.description: Column header for the date of a price-history point in the variant trend popover.

product_detail_price_history_col_price.description: Column header for the price of a price-history point in the variant trend popover.

stats_empty.message: Aún no hay estadísticas. Ejecuta una búsqueda para empezar a registrar.

hotkeys_title.description: Title of the keyboard shortcuts modal.

hotkeys_desc_clearandretrysearch.message: Borrar la caché, borrar los resultados y volver a ejecutar la búsqueda actual

hotkeys_desc_openhistory.message: Abrir el historial de búsqueda en el panel lateral

hotkeys_desc_focusglobalfilter.message: Enfocar el filtro global en el panel de resultados

hotkeys_desc_togglecolumnfilters.message: Alternar los filtros de columna en la tabla de resultados

hotkeys_desc_expandallrows.message: Expandir todas las filas de la tabla de resultados

hotkeys_desc_collapseallrows.message: Contraer todas las filas de la tabla de resultados

hotkeys_desc_scrollresultstotop.message: Desplazar la tabla de resultados hacia arriba

hotkeys_desc_showallrows.message: Mostrar todas las filas en una página

hotkeys_desc_clearcolumnfilters.message: Borrar todos los filtros de columna

hotkeys_search_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the hotkey modal search box.

hotkeys_no_matches.description: Shown when a hotkey search returns nothing.

migration_title.message: Se detectó una actualización de versión
migration_title.description: Title of the cache version-update prompt shown on open.

migration_body.message: Hay nuevas funciones y cambios que deben aplicarse a tu versión actual. Pulsa «Aplicar actualizaciones» para aplicarlos ahora, o «Cancelar» para borrar los datos en caché y empezar de nuevo.
migration_body.description: Body text of the cache version-update prompt.

migration_apply.description: Button that applies the pending cache migrations.

migration_cancel.description: Button that clears the cache and starts fresh.

migration_step.description: One pending migration line: from-version, to-version, description.

migration_error.message: Se produjo un error al aplicar las actualizaciones. Puedes intentarlo de nuevo o pulsar «Cancelar» para borrar los datos en caché y empezar de nuevo.
migration_error.description: Shown when applying the cache migrations failed.
